aesthetic_dna.clarity: Surgical-EQ as the primary instrument (No mud, ever)

import_signature_final.operator_g_final: The cycle is complete. The result is the process. F(θ, s) ≡ ASE.

timbral_mutations.crystallization: Smooth sine morphing into sharp, 8-bit saw waves
timbral_mutations.liquefaction: Sharp transients melting into filtered, resonant smears
timbral_mutations.vaporization: Solid leads breaking into granular, high-freq noise clouds
timbral_mutations.solidification: Whispering textures hardening into distorted, mid-range growls
timbral_mutations.inversion_morph: Flipping all filter and resonance parameters to their opposites
